items.caption: A slide from a presentation on rfid technology. the slide contains text and a photograph of an rfid reader device. the text defines rfid as a means of storing and retrieving data through electromagnetic transmission to an rf-compatible integrated circuit. it lists components of an rfid system as rfid readers, rfid tags, and an rfid system. the photograph shows an rfid reader device with an antenna and a small tag placed on a surface. the background is a plain, light-colored surface.
